installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
buildCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10 --activate && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/unisphere run build && rm -rf public && mkdir -p public && cp -R artifacts/unisphere/dist/public/* public/
